description: Messages unify across your inboxes, with significantly faster response times thanks to accurate auto-drafting. We also rebuilt the sidebar with a cleaner Mail-style design for easy access
title: RPLY 2.0 & Connect (X, Slack, LinkedIn, Email, Instagram and more)
features: Mail-style UI for easy sorting and viewing
Addition of X, LinkedIn, Telegram, Email, Slack, Instagram in additon to iMessage and Whatsapp
